notes_md:
**tiếp xúc** = to have contact with someone/something, or to be exposed to something. It can be physical contact or social/professional interaction.

It’s mainly used as a verb and almost always goes with **với**.  

You’ll often see it with people (khách hàng, người lạ), or risks (vi khuẩn, ánh nắng, hóa chất). It can also be a noun meaning “contact/exposure” in more formal contexts.

Close idea: **liên hệ** (contact in communication).  
Different: **chạm** = physically touch.

translation.en: We need to contact the customers.

content.sentence: Chúng tôi cần ___ với khách hàng.

example.en: We need to have more contact with each other.
example.es: Necesitamos tener más contacto entre nosotros.
example.vi: Chúng ta cần tiếp xúc với nhau nhiều hơn.

definitions.vi: Hành động tiếp xúc hoặc tương tác với ai đó hoặc cái gì đó.
definitions.en: The act of coming into contact or interaction with someone or something.
definitions.es: El acto de entrar en contacto o interacción con alguien o algo.

notes:
tiếp xúc = to have contact with someone/something, or to be exposed to something. It can be physical contact or social/professional interaction.

It’s mainly used as a verb and almost always goes with với.  

You’ll often see it with people (khách hàng, người lạ), or risks (vi khuẩn, ánh nắng, hóa chất). It can also be a noun meaning “contact/exposure” in more formal contexts.

Close idea: liên hệ (contact in communication).  
Different: chạm = physically touch.

content.sentence: Chúng tôi cần ___ với khách hàng.

translation.en: We need to contact the customers.

exampleSentences: Anh hạn chế tiếp xúc với người lạ để bảo vệ sức khỏe.
Chị đã tiếp xúc với nhiều nền văn hóa khác nhau khi đi du lịch.
Khi làm việc nhóm, việc tiếp xúc thường xuyên là rất quan trọng.
exampleSentencesTranslated: He limits contact with strangers to protect his health.
She had contact with many different cultures when traveling.
When working in a team, frequent contact is very important.
